summary: Iteration 21: Synthetic Heartbeat Telemetry Seeder complete backend testing. All 18 tests passed for POST /api/operator/simulate/heartbeat-seed endpoint. Verified: (1) Normal battery drain creates telemetry records, (2) Multi-metric seeding (battery_level + signal_strength), (3) Deterministic mode via random_seed, (4) Gap patterns cause records_skipped_by_gaps > 0, (5) Anomalous drain triggers anomaly detection, (6) trigger_evaluation=false skips evaluation, (7) RBAC (guardian=403, unauthenticated=401), (8) Error handling (404 nonexistent device, 422 for invalid params), (9) Cooldown behavior, (10) Baselines updated, (11) GET /api/operator/device-anomalies returns seeded anomalies, (12) Very short duration works, (13) Battery value clamping to 0-100, (14) Response structure validation.

test_results.test_normal_battery_drain_creates_teleme: PASS - Created 11 records for 10 min duration
test_results.test_multi_metric_seeding: PASS - Both battery_level and signal_strength seeded
test_results.test_gap_patterns_cause_skipped_records: PASS - Gap patterns skip records correctly
test_results.test_battery_level_values_are_clamped_to: PASS - Aggressive drain handled with clamping

critical_code_review_comments: Endpoint correctly implements deterministic seeding via random_seed parameter
Multi-metric pattern abstraction is well-designed for future extensibility
Battery value clamping (0-100) and signal_strength clamping (-120..0) properly implemented
RBAC correctly enforces operator/admin only access
seed_data_creation: Multiple telemetry records created via heartbeat-seed endpoint during tests. 6 anomalies detected, 12 baselines computed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Synthetic Heartbeat Telemetry Seeder endpoint fully tested. All 15 required test cases covered plus additional validation tests. The seeder successfully creates backdated telemetry records, computes baselines, and detects anomalies. Devices used: DEV-001, DEV-002, WATCH-001, WBAND-LC-001, WBAND-E2E-001, Mob-01. Anomaly cooldown is 10 minutes, so devices seeded in this session may have active cooldowns.
